_INSTRUCTIONS: Merge this fragment into ~/.codex/hooks.json under the top-level 'hooks' key. The 'Stop' and 'SessionStart' entries each merge under their respective top-level keys. Where you already have hooks for an event (e.g. context-mode under PreToolUse / SessionStart), append to the existing hooks[] array. Replace $HOME with your actual home path — codex does NOT expand env vars in the command string. Remove this _INSTRUCTIONS field after merging.
